_note: PROTECTED network ao:BRUNETTI_ROBERT. protected_network_hold=true PRESERVED regardless of evidence strength, until explicitly released.

result.structure_evidence: Robert G. Brunetti DDS MBA founded the group in 1979, incorporated as Procare Dental Group, P.C. in 1993; President/CEO. BBB Arlington Heights profile lists internal executive team (Cheryl Crowley DDS CEO, Michael Albano COO), no external management company or PE. Website self-describes 'family-owned.' 10 active locations each operate under a distinct local DBA (Premier Dental Associates – Arlington Heights, Associates in Dentistry – Park Ridge, Central DuPage Dental Group – Wheaton, Grand Dentistry – Gurnee, Lakeside Dentistry – Evanston, Naperbrook Dentistry – Naperville, River North Dental Group – Chicago, Village Square Dentistry – Lake Zurich, Lakehills Dentistry – Crystal Lake, Boone Creek Dentistry – McHenry) unified under Procare PC on procaredentalgroup.com/locations. No PE/MSO/DSO platform found in any registry, PitchBook, or search.
result.pe_evidence: No PE funding/investors/platform affiliations found. PitchBook stub (354092-41) lists no investors. Website says family-owned. Not in GDN/PESP/Becker's/PitchBook deal databases.
